name: Today I Divorce My Superstar Husband
overview: Kang Hye-in secretly marries Choi Hyun, Korea's biggest star, and endures contempt and betrayal alone in their hidden marriage. After the tragedy of losing her child, she decides to divorce him. With the separation, the life Hye-in kept from Hyun quietly begins to unfold, and the moment she lets everything go, her life takes an unexpected turn.
